title: ReFrame
description: Invisible & Floating & Click-Through ItemFrames with WG support
body:
Use Shift + Right Click on ItemFrame with empty hand to open the GUI

Feautures:
- Invisibility
- Fixation
- Click-Through to open a Chest, Furnace, Crafting Table etc.
- Supports protection plugins (WorldGuard, Lands, GriefPrevention & other)

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HTm4xtMZ/images/42658fcaee81c9ae1719bf31683e1a821ebaf937.png)
